rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 9, 2013, line 1. DEFENDANT JAMES DELAMETER AND VIOLA DELAMETER'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED. Triable issues of material fact exist at least as to facts Nos. 5, 7, 13 and 14. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MOHSIN AHMMED VS. BANK OF AMERICA N.A. et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 9, 2013, line 2. DEFENDANT CHICAGO TITLE COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Sustained without leave to amend. Fist Amended Complaint replaced Chicago Title Insurance Company with Chicago Title Company. No charging allegations against moving Defendant remain. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SUSAN MAYO et al VS. CADELINIA & LEUNG, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 9, 2013, line 3. DEFENDANT CHICAGO TITLE INSURANCE COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND for Plaintiffs to allege facts showing tolling of statute of limitations as to all causes of action, specifically facts showing diligence in discovering Chicago Title Insurance Company's wrongdoings. Moving party is ordered to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6C in future. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ESPERANZA LI VS. BRADEN MORE et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 9, 2013, line 6. DEFENDANT CHICAGO TITLE COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Demurrer is sustained without leave to amend as to cause of action for Ejectment. No meaningful opposition. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to causes of action for breach of contract and negligence to (1) join Hong and (2) allege facts showing all elements of these causes of action including, but not limited to, facts showing Plaintiff was a third-party beneficiary of 2011 contract; CTC's duty to follow Mark company's instructions in relation to contract between Hong and More; Statute of Limitations started running in 2011. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: D. BUCKLEY PROPERTIES INC., et al VS. PALOMA GAOS et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 9, 2013, line 7. PLAINTIFF D. BUCKLEY PROPERTIES INC., AND DAVID BUCKLEY'S Motion For Atty'S Fees DENIED. Moving party failed to show that special motion to strike was frivolous or was solely intended to cause unnecessary delay. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: STEVEN M ROBERTSON VS. JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 9, 2013, line 12. DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. AND JOSEPH TORRANO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Continued to May 9, 2013. Moving party is ordered to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6C and provide courtesy copy of operative complaint; opposing party is ordered to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of opposition no later than April 30, 2013 with cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY, AS TRUSTEE VS. KENNETT TAYLOR et al

rulings.Case Title: 1320-1380 LOMBARD STREET, LLC VS. LETICIA GONZALES et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Default And Quash Writ Of Possession
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 9, 2013, line 10. DEFENDANT LETICIA GONZALES' Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Default And Quash Writ Of Possession GRANTED under mandatory provision of CCP 473(b). Defendant shall post $7,800 with the Court no later than April 12, 2013. Defendant's counsel shall remit $1,095 to Plaintiff's counsel within 20 days. = (501/REQ)
